back_translation: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
'See, I have called by name Bezalel son of Uri, son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah.'
'I have filled him with the Spirit of God, with wisdom, with understanding, with knowledge, and with all craftsmanship,'
'to devise designs, to work in gold, in silver, and in bronze,'
'and in cutting stones for setting, and in carving wood, to work in all craftsmanship.'
'I, behold, have given with him Oholiab son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan; and in the heart of every wise of heart I have given wisdom, and they shall make all that I have commanded you:'
'the Tent of Meeting, the ark for the Testimony, the mercy seat that is upon it, and all the vessels of the tent,'
'and the table and its vessels, the pure lampstand and all its vessels, and the altar of incense,'
'and the altar of burnt offering and all its vessels, and the basin and its stand,'
'and the woven garments, and the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons to serve as priests,'
'and the anointing oil and the fragrant incense for the holy place. According to all that I have commanded you, they shall make it.'
The LORD said to Moses, saying,

'You, speak to the sons of Israel, saying: Surely my Sabbaths you shall keep, for it is a sign between me and you throughout your generations, that you may know that I am the LORD who sanctifies you.'
'You shall keep the Sabbath, for it is holy to you. Whoever profanes it shall surely be put to death; for whoever does any work on it, that soul shall be cut off from among his people.'
'Six days work shall be done, but on the seventh day is a Sabbath of complete rest, holy to the LORD. Whoever does any work on the Sabbath day shall surely be put to death.'
'The sons of Israel shall keep the Sabbath, observing the Sabbath throughout their generations as a perpetual covenant.'
'It is a sign between me and the sons of Israel forever; for in six days the LORD made the heavens and the earth, and on the seventh day he rested and was refreshed.'
When he had finished speaking with him on Mount Sinai, he gave to Moses the two tablets of the Testimony, tablets of stone written by the finger of God.
